docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,960.00 FILED BY MARQUE, CAROL AS TO DEFENDANT ARIELI, ORI OUT OF THE BOX MOVING SOLUTIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-29-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARIELI, ORI OUT OF THE BOX MOVING SOLUTIONS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARQUE, CAROL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OUT OF THE BOX GROUP, INC. $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $830.00, THE PARTIES AGREE TO DELETE ORI ARIELI AS AN INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT AND ADD OUT OF THE BOX GROUP, INC. AS THE SOLE DEFENDANT WHO WAIVES NOTICE, SERVICE AND ALL IRREGULARITIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ARIELI, ORI IS NO LONGER DEFENDANT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CAROL MARQUE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ORI ARIELI OUT OF THE BOX MOVING SOLUTIONS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
